package perflayers

import (
    "regexp"
    "time"
)

var compiledPattern = regexp.MustCompile("^ok$")

func PatternMatcher(input string) bool {
    return compiledPattern.MatchString(input)
}

func FormatSimpleConcat(a, b string) string {
    return a + ":" + b
}

func AppendWithKnownCapacity(items []int) []int {
    out := make([]int, 0, len(items))
    for _, item := range items {
        out = append(out, item)
    }
    return out
}

func TickerStoppedOnExit() {
    ticker := time.NewTicker(time.Second)
    defer ticker.Stop()
    _ = ticker
}
